description: Perform an exploratory distributional analysis on the ToothGrowth dataset (/home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/ToothGrowth.csv). Filter the dataset to exclude the 1.0 dosage level, keeping only rows where 'dose' is 0.5 or 2.0. Analyze the 'len' variable split by 'supp' using a visualization that combines violin plots, box plots, and raw data points, ensuring the mean is not displayed. Save the Jamovi project to /home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/ToothGrowth_Violin.omv and export the distribution plot to /home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/violin_distribution.png.
